title: HOZELOCK - Multi-Jet Spray Gun : Ideal for Daily Use, Multi-tasking Gun, Locking Function and Flow Control, 5 Patterns: Cone, Jet, Fast Fill, Fine Rose Flat [2676P0000]
features: Five spray patterns for all garden tasks
Made from high quality materials for increased durability
Quick connect male connector allows a simple connection to your Hozelock System
Flow control that adjusts the level of water sprayed
description: From the manufacturer Multi Spray Gun Transform your gardening routine with the Hozelock Multi Spray Gun – versatile, durable, and easy to use for every task! Multi Spray Gun Made from high-quality materials for enhanced durability, the Hozelock Multi Spray Gun is designed to make garden watering quick and effortless. It features a convenient quick-connect male connector, allowing you to easily switch between different attachments without any fuss. Choose from five spray patterns to suit every task: a Cone spray for delicate watering, a Powerful Jet for tough cleaning jobs, a Fast Fill setting for filling buckets and watering cans, a Fine Rose for gently watering seedlings, and a Flat spray ideal for rinsing soap off cars. The soft-touch trigger offers a comfortable grip and fits neatly in your hand, making it easy to use for longer periods. For added convenience, the trigger can be locked in place, reducing hand strain during extended watering sessions. The spray gun also features adjustable flow control, letting you modify the water output from 50% to 100%, giving you complete control and helping you save water. Key Benefits Include: Five versatile spray patterns to suit all your watering and cleaning needs. Built with premium materials for a longer-lasting, reliable performance. Quick-connect system for fast and easy attachment to your Hozelock setup. Adjustable flow control so you can water your garden just the way you like. Features 5 Spray Patterns The Cone Spray is perfect for delicate watering, ensuring a gentle flow for your plants. The Powerful Jet for tough cleaning tasks like washing patios or cleaning off debris. The Fast Fill option is ideal for quickly filling buckets and watering cans, saving you time when you need it most. The Fine Rose pattern provides a soft, even spray, perfect for watering young seedlings or delicate plants without causing damage. The Flat Spray is perfect for rinsing soap off cars, patios, or windows, ensuring a smooth, thorough clean. Soft-Touch Water Control The soft-touch trigger that is ergonomically designed for comfort during use. Its sleek, contoured shape fits perfectly in your hand, allowing for a secure grip and reducing strain during longer watering sessions. Whether you're watering plants or cleaning outdoor surfaces, the comfortable handle ensures a relaxed, controlled experience, making your gardening tasks feel effortless. Lock Position for Prolonged Use Includes a trigger lock feature, which keeps the trigger in place when watering for extended periods. This handy function allows you to water your garden without needing to constantly hold the trigger, making it ideal for long watering sessions. It reduces hand strain and provides a steady, continuous water flow, so you can focus on the task at hand without interruption. Perfect for larger areas, it enhances your efficiency and comfort while saving you effort. Easy-to-Use Flow Adjuster Features an adjustable flow control that lets you regulate the water output from 50% to 100% , giving you complete control over your watering. Whether you need a gentle spray for delicate plants or a powerful jet for cleaning tasks, this adjustable setting ensures you can customise the water flow to suit your needs. It also helps conserve water by allowing you to reduce the flow when a lighter spray is sufficient, making it both eco-conscious and efficient for various garden tasks.
